Composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py
- Resolve the issue causing `jinja2.exceptions.TemplateNotFound  dashboard.html` by verifying and configuring the Flask app's template folder path if necessary.
- Ensure all routes correctly render their respective templates and that the backend logic fully supports the requirements for all eight pages.
- Maintain and improve file read/write operations for all data files in the 'data/' directory using plain text.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to confirm template file names and locations match the backend render_template calls.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 and Programmer 3 to ensure the backend serves the frontend templates and static assets correctly.
Composition.Programmer 2:
Implement and organize all frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Create all eight HTML templates as specified  dashboard.html, property_search.html, property_details.html, property_inquiry.html, my_inquiries.html, my_favorites.html, agents.html, and locations.html.
- Ensure all templates strictly follow the detailed page design and element IDs as specified in the requirements document.
- Place all templates inside the 'templates/' directory at the root of the project to ensure Flask can locate them.
- Use URLs as routes (not direct HTML file names) in all frontend code.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm template file names and locations match backend render_template calls.
- Coordinate with Programmer 3 to ensure CSS and JS static assets are properly linked in the templates.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of ALL pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
